scenario.name: ESRP_CHFE_006_var1

Global.variables: IF_OSP_BCF, IF_BCF_ESRP, IF_CHFE_ESRP, IF_ESRP_CHFE, IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP, conference_id, CHFE_tel, OSP_tel, TS-CHFE_tel, SUBSCRIBE_CHFE_conference_Call_ID, REFER_CHFE_conference_Call_ID, SUBSCRIBE_TS-CHFE_conference_Call_ID, last_Via, last_From, last_To, last_Call-ID, last_CSeq

scenario.send:
NOTIFY sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 To: <sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]> From: <sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]> Call-ID: [$SUBSCRIBE_CHFE_conference_Call_ID] CSeq: 1 NOTIFY Contact: <sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]>;isfocus Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, OPTIONS, BYE, REFER, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY Event: conference Accept: application/sdp, message/sipfrag Subscription-State: active;expires=3600 Supported: replaces, join, gruu Content-Type: application/conference-info+xml Content-Length: [len]
<conference-info version="0" state="full" entity="sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]"> <conference-description> <conf-uris> <entry> <uri>sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]</uri> </entry> </conf-uris> </conference-description> <users> <user entity="sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]" state="full"> <display-text>CHFE</display-text> <endpoint entity="sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]"> <status>connected</status> <joining-method>dialed-in</joining-method> <media id="1"> <display-text>Main Audio</display-text> <type>audio</type> <src-id>583398</src-id> <status>sendrecv</status> </media> </endpoint> </user> <user entity="sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_OSP_BCF]:[local_port]" state="full"> <display-text>OSP</display-text> <endpoint entity="sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_OSP_BCF]:[local_port]"> <status>connected</status> <joining-method>dialed-in</joining-method> <media id="1"> <display-text>Main Audio</display-text> <type>audio</type> <src-id>583398</src-id> <status>sendrecv</status> </media> </endpoint> </user> </users> </conference-info>

NOTIFY sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 To: <sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]> From: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Call-ID: [$REFER_CHFE_conference_Call_ID] CSeq: 2 NOTIFY Contact: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;isfocus Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, OPTIONS, BYE, REFER, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY Event: refer Subscription-State: active;expires=3600 Supported: replaces, join, gruu Content-Type: message/sipfrag;version=2.0 Content-Length: [len]
SIP/2.0 100 Trying

INVITE sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> To: sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] Call-ID: esrp_to_ts_CHFE@[local_ip] Cseq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;isfocus Max-Forwards: 70 Supported: replaces

NOTIFY sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 To: <sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]> From: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Call-ID: [$REFER_CHFE_conference_Call_ID] CSeq: 3 NOTIFY Contact: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;isfocus Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, OPTIONS, BYE, REFER, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY Event: refer Subscription-State: active;expires=3600 Supported: replaces, join, gruu Content-Type: message/sipfrag;version=2.0 Content-Length: [len]
SIP/2.0 180 Ringing

ACK sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> To: sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] Call-ID: esrp_to_ts_CHFE@[local_ip] Cseq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;isfocus Content-Length: 0

NOTIFY sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 To: <sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]> From: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Call-ID: [$REFER_CHFE_conference_Call_ID] CSeq: 3 NOTIFY Contact: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;isfocus Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, OPTIONS, BYE, REFER, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY Event: refer Subscription-State: terminated Supported: replaces, join, gruu Content-Type: message/sipfrag;version=2.0 Content-Length: [len]
SIP/2.0 200 OK

NOTIFY sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 To: <sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]> From: <sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]> Call-ID: [$SUBSCRIBE_CHFE_conference_Call_ID] CSeq: 1 NOTIFY Contact: <sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]>;isfocus Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, OPTIONS, BYE, REFER, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY Event: conference Accept: application/sdp, message/sipfrag Subscription-State: active;expires=3600 Supported: replaces, join, gruu Content-Type: application/conference-info+xml Content-Length: [len]
<conference-info version="0" state="full" entity="sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]"> <conference-description> <conf-uris> <entry> <uri>sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]</uri> </entry> </conf-uris> </conference-description> <users> <user entity="sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]" state="full"> <display-text>CHFE</display-text> <endpoint entity="sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]"> <status>connected</status> <joining-method>dialed-in</joining-method> <media id="1"> <display-text>Main Audio</display-text> <type>audio</type> <src-id>583398</src-id> <status>sendrecv</status> </media> </endpoint> </user> <user entity="sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_OSP_BCF]:[local_port]" state="full"> <display-text>OSP</display-text> <endpoint entity="sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_OSP_BCF]:[local_port]"> <status>connected</status> <joining-method>dialed-in</joining-method> <media id="1"> <display-text>Main Audio</display-text> <type>audio</type> <src-id>583398</src-id> <status>sendrecv</status> </media> </endpoint> </user> <user entity="sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]" state="full"> <display-text>TS-CHFE</display-text> <endpoint entity="sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]"> <status>connected</status> <joining-method>dialed-in</joining-method> <media id="1"> <display-text>Main Audio</display-text> <type>audio</type> <src-id>583398</src-id> <status>sendrecv</status> </media> </endpoint> </user> </users> </conference-info>

NOTIFY sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 To: <sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]> From: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Call-ID: [$SUBSCRIBE_TS-CHFE_conference_Call_ID] CSeq: 1 NOTIFY Contact: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;isfocus Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, OPTIONS, BYE, REFER, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY Event: conference Accept: application/sdp, message/sipfrag Subscription-State: active;expires=3600 Supported: replaces, join, gruu Content-Type: application/conference-info+xml Content-Length: [len]
<conference-info version="0" state="full" entity="sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]"> <conference-description> <conf-uris> <entry> <uri>sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]</uri> </entry> </conf-uris> </conference-description> <users> <user entity="sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]" state="full"> <display-text>CHFE</display-text> <endpoint entity="sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]"> <status>connected</status> <joining-method>dialed-in</joining-method> <media id="1"> <display-text>Main Audio</display-text> <type>audio</type> <src-id>583398</src-id> <status>sendrecv</status> </media> </endpoint> </user> <user entity="sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_OSP_BCF]:[local_port]" state="full"> <display-text>OSP</display-text> <endpoint entity="sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_OSP_BCF]:[local_port]"> <status>connected</status> <joining-method>dialed-in</joining-method> <media id="1"> <display-text>Main Audio</display-text> <type>audio</type> <src-id>583398</src-id> <status>sendrecv</status> </media> </endpoint> </user> <user entity="sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]" state="full"> <display-text>TS-CHFE</display-text> <endpoint entity="sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]"> <status>connected</status> <joining-method>dialed-in</joining-method> <media id="1"> <display-text>Main Audio</display-text> <type>audio</type> <src-id>583398</src-id> <status>sendrecv</status> </media> </endpoint> </user> </users> </conference-info>

NOTIFY sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 To: <sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]> From: <sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]> Call-ID: [$SUBSCRIBE_CHFE_conference_Call_ID] CSeq: 1 NOTIFY Contact: <sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]>;isfocus Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, OPTIONS, BYE, REFER, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY Event: conference Accept: application/sdp, message/sipfrag Subscription-State: terminated Supported: replaces, join, gruu Content-Type: application/conference-info+xml Content-Length: [len]

NOTIFY sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 To: <sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]> From: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Call-ID: [$SUBSCRIBE_TS-CHFE_conference_Call_ID] CSeq: 1 NOTIFY Contact: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;isfocus Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, OPTIONS, BYE, REFER, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY Event: conference Accept: application/sdp, message/sipfrag Subscription-State: active;expires=3600 Supported: replaces, join, gruu Content-Type: application/conference-info+xml Content-Length: [len]
<conference-info version="0" state="full" entity="sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]"> <conference-description> <conf-uris> <entry> <uri>sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]</uri> </entry> </conf-uris> </conference-description> <user entity="sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_OSP_BCF]:[local_port]" state="full"> <display-text>OSP</display-text> <endpoint entity="sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_OSP_BCF]:[local_port]"> <status>connected</status> <joining-method>dialed-in</joining-method> <media id="1"> <display-text>Main Audio</display-text> <type>audio</type> <src-id>583398</src-id> <status>sendrecv</status> </media> </endpoint> </user> <user entity="sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]" state="full"> <display-text>TS-CHFE</display-text> <endpoint entity="sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]"> <status>connected</status> <joining-method>dialed-in</joining-method> <media id="1"> <display-text>Main Audio</display-text> <type>audio</type> <src-id>583398</src-id> <status>sendrecv</status> </media> </endpoint> </user> </users> </conference-info>

BYE sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_BCF_ESRP]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> To: sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_BCF_ESRP]:[local_port] [$last_Call-ID] [$last_CSeq] Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0

NOTIFY sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 To: <sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port]> From: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Call-ID: [$SUBSCRIBE_TS-CHFE_conference_Call_ID] CSeq: 1 NOTIFY Contact: <sip:[$conference_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;isfocus Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, OPTIONS, BYE, REFER, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY Event: conference Accept: application/sdp, message/sipfrag Subscription-State: terminated Supported: replaces, join, gruu Content-Type: application/conference-info+xml Content-Length: [len]
